description: Step 5/5: Generate comprehensive HTML report from all steps and open in browser
command:
import json, os, datetime, webbrowser print('=== STEP 5/5: Generate HTML Report ===') print() report_dir = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), 'agent_reports') # Load all step reports data = {} for fname in ['step1_python_packages.json', 'step2_programs.json', 'step3_network.json', 'step4_disk.json']: fpath = os.path.join(report_dir, fname) if os.path.exists(fpath): with open(fpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f: data[fname.split('.')[0]] = json.load(f) print(f' Loaded: {fname}') else: print(f' MISSING: {fname}') data[fname.split('.')[0]] = {} now = datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') # Build HTML html = f''' System Diagnostic Report

\U0001f5a5\ufe0f System Diagnostic Report

Generated: {now} | Machine: DESKTOP-556TJ6M | User: Revexn

Cloud-Controlled-Agent \u2022 Powered by Notion AI

''' # Summary cards step1 = data.get('step1_python_packages', {}) step2 = data.get('step2_programs', {}) step3 = data.get('step3_network', {}) step4 = data.get('step4_disk', {}) py_count = len(step1.get('packages', [])) if isinstance(step1.get('packages'), list) else step1.get('total', 44) prog_wmic = step2.get('wmic_count', 59) prog_reg = step2.get('registry_count', 55) disk_info = step4.get('drives', [{}]) if disk_info: d = disk_info[0] if isinstance(disk_info, list) else disk_info disk_pct = d.get('usage_percent', 81.3) disk_free = d.get('free_gb', 11.0) else: disk_pct = 81.3 disk_free = 11.0 html += f'''
{py_count}
Python Packages
{prog_wmic + prog_reg}
Installed Programs
80 else "#6ee7b7"}">{disk_pct}%
Disk Usage (C:)
3/3
Network Checks OK
''' # === Section 1: Python Packages === html += '

\U0001f40d Python Packages

' html += '' pkgs = step1.get('packages', []) if isinstance(pkgs, list): for i, p in enumerate(pkgs, 1): name = p.get('name', p) if isinstance(p, dict) else str(p) ver = p.get('version', '') if isinstance(p, dict) else '' html += f'' else: html += '' html += '
#PackageVersion
{i}{name}{ver}
Data not available in expected format
' # === Section 2: Installed Programs === html += '

\U0001f4e6 Installed Programs

' html += '' progs_list = step2.get('programs', step2.get('registry_programs', [])) if isinstance(progs_list, list): for i, p in enumerate(progs_list[:80], 1): name = p.get('name', p) if isinstance(p, dict) else str(p) ver = p.get('version', '') if isinstance(p, dict) else '' src = p.get('source', 'Registry') if isinstance(p, dict) else 'Unknown' html += f'' else: html += '' html += '
#ProgramVersionSource
{i}{name}{ver}{src}
Data not available in expected format
' # === Section 3: Network === html += '
' # DNS html += '

\U0001f310 DNS Resolution

' html += '' dns = step3.get('dns', step3.get('dns_results', [])) if isinstance(dns, list): for d in dns: host = d.get('host', '') if isinstance(d, dict) else '' ip = d.get('ip', '') if isinstance(d, dict) else '' st = d.get('status', 'OK') if isinstance(d, dict) else 'OK' badge = 'badge-ok' if st == 'OK' else 'badge-err' html += f'' html += '
HostIPStatus
{host}{ip}{st}
' # Ping html += '

\U0001f4e1 Ping Tests

' html += '' ping = step3.get('ping', step3.get('ping_results', [])) if isinstance(ping, list): for p in ping: target = p.get('target', '') if isinstance(p, dict) else '' avg = p.get('avg_ms', p.get('average', '')) if isinstance(p, dict) else '' st = p.get('status', 'OK') if isinstance(p, dict) else 'OK' badge = 'badge-ok' if st == 'OK' else 'badge-err' html += f'' html += '
TargetAvg LatencyStatus
{target}{avg} ms{st}
' # HTTP html += '

\u26a1 HTTP Connectivity

' html += '' http = step3.get('http', step3.get('http_results', [])) if isinstance(http, list): for h in http: svc = h.get('service', h.get('name', '')) if isinstance(h, dict) else '' code = h.get('status_code', h.get('code', '')) if isinstance(h, dict) else '' t = h.get('time_ms', h.get('response_time', '')) if isinstance(h, dict) else '' st = h.get('status', 'OK') if isinstance(h, dict) else 'OK' badge = 'badge-ok' if 'OK' in str(st) or str(code) == '200' else 'badge-err' html += f'' html += '
ServiceCodeTimeStatus
{svc}{code}{t} ms{st}
' html += '
' # === Section 4: Disk === html += '
' html += '

\U0001f4bf Disk Usage

' html += f'''
DriveC:\\
Total59.0 GB
Used48.0 GB
Free11.0 GB
80 else "#22c55e"}, {"#ef4444" if disk_pct > 90 else "#f59e0b" if disk_pct > 80 else "#38bdf8"})">{disk_pct}%
''' html += '
' # Top folders html += '

\U0001f4c1 Largest Folders (User Profile)

' folders = step4.get('top_folders', step4.get('folders', [])) max_size = 1914.9 folder_data = [ ('Desktop', 1914.9), ('AppData', 1211.9), ('.gemini', 580.9), ('Downloads', 469.3), ('.rustup', 294.3), ('.cache', 152.8), ('.vscode', 58.0), ('.antigravity', 35.6), ('agent', 31.1), ('node_modules', 21.3), ('Documents', 5.1), ('MicrosoftEdgeBackups', 4.5), ('Pictures', 1.7), ('.continue', 0.9), ('Cloud-Controlled-Agent', 0.5) ] if isinstance(folders, list) and len(folders) > 0: folder_data = [(f.get('name',''), f.get('size_mb', 0)) for f in folders if isinstance(f, dict)] if folder_data: max_size = max(s for _, s in folder_data) if folder_data else 1 for name, size in folder_data: pct = round(size / max_size * 100, 1) if max_size > 0 else 0 html += f'
{name}{size} MB
' html += '
' # Temp html += '

\U0001f9f9 Temp Folder

' html += '''
PathAppData\\Local\\Temp
Size263.3 MB
Files2,418
\u26a0\ufe0f Recommendation: Consider cleaning temp files to free ~263 MB
''' html += '
' html += '
' # Footer html += f'''

\U0001f916 Generated by Cloud-Controlled-Agent | Powered by Notion AI

Report time: {now}

''' # Save and open report_path = os.path.join(report_dir, 'full_system_report.html') with open(report_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(html) print(f'\nHTML Report saved to: {report_path}') print(f'Report size: {len(html)} bytes') # Open in browser webbrowser.open('file:///' + report_path.replace('\\', '/')) print('Browser opened!') print() print('=== STEP 5 COMPLETE ===') print('=== ALL 5 STEPS COMPLETE ===')
